title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.410 - Assignment of support rights, obligation to state, when
text:
454.410.  Assignment of support rights, obligation to state, when. — Support rights assigned to the state shall constitute an obligation owed to the state by the person responsible for providing such support and the obligation shall be collectible pursuant to all legal processes.
(L. 1982 S.B. 468 § 3, A.L. 1986 H.B. 1479, A.L. 1997 S.B. 361) 
Effective 7-01-97 
Lottery winnings subject to delinquent child support payments, 313.321
